result:
Both reports are valid. Here's the summary:

---

## AirTip Bug Hunt — 2026-02-23

**12 findings** across HIGH (3), MEDIUM (6), LOW (3).

### HIGH
| ID | Title |
|----|-------|
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-001` | **Prisma client out-of-sync** — `TipUser`, `TipUserRole`, `TipOrganization`, `TipAuditAction`, `StaffRoleType` missing from `@prisma/client`. TypeScript compilation broken in 7+ AirTip files. Fix: `npx prisma generate`. |
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-002` | **Submit endpoint race condition** — `POST /scans/submit` uses a plain `update` instead of `updateMany` with an atomic status guard. A concurrent manager approval can be overwritten back to `PENDING_REVIEW`. |
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-003` | **`findStaffByName` uses outer `prisma` client inside `$transaction`** — tip-out staff lookups bypass transaction isolation; concurrent confirms for the same new recipient create duplicate `TipStaff` records. |

### MEDIUM
| ID | Title |
|----|-------|
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-004` | OCR falsely flags today's date as missing — same-day scans always trigger an unnecessary review step |
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-005` | `new Date(shiftDate)` parses as UTC midnight — scans near pay-period boundaries assigned to wrong period in offset timezones |
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-006` | Default org timezone hardcoded to `America/Chicago` — wrong for any non-Central-Time restaurant |
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-007` | `getMidnightInTimezone` uses fragile `toLocaleString` parsing — can produce wrong DST offset near transitions |
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-008` | Magic-link rate limit is per-email only — attacker can lock out any user with known email (DoS) |
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-009` | Tip-out reconciliation totals accumulated as floats — IEEE 754 drift in `tipouts/route.ts` |

### LOW
| ID | Title |
|----|-------|
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-010` | Dead `localMidnight` variable in `getMidnightInTimezone` |
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-011` | ADMINs can create unlimited ADMIN-role invite links without restriction |
| `at-bug-2026-02-23-012` | OCR `confidence: "low"` not stored or displayed — low-confidence scans indistinguishable in ledger |

Reports written to:
- `reports/2026-02-23-bug-hunt-review.md`
- `reports/2026-02-23-bug-hunt-review.json`

REVIEW_COMPLETE
